acceptanceNotes.description: Produced task Work Brief validates through the artifacts package
Bug-shaped task without reproduction basis fails closed

background: Direct task intake should preserve enough bug evidence for planning.
constraints: Use the shared Work Brief artifact class
desiredOutcome: The task producer writes a validator-accepted bug Work Brief through the common writer.
expectedBehavior: Plan intake rejects the carrier with a typed validation result and no downstream plan output.

producerSignals.objective: Capture a direct bug request as a typed Work Brief for planning.
producerSignals.request: A generated artifact handoff fails when a malformed carrier is supplied.

nonGoals: Do not run the bug fix
observedBehavior: Plan intake reports a malformed carrier when the file is not valid JSON.

ownership.concurrencyNotes: I-05B producer-owned Work Brief output; final planning/risk analysis is downstream.

problemOrOpportunity:
Bug-shaped work is unsafe to plan without observed behavior, expected behavior, and reproduction basis.

Task objective: Capture a direct bug request as a typed Work Brief for planning.
reproductionSteps: Write a non-JSON file in an allowed intake root
Call plan intake with that relative artifact name
risksAndUnknowns: Reproduction details may need expansion during planning
title: Normalize a direct bug request into Work Brief
userVisibleBehavior: Users can submit a direct bug request without bypassing Work Brief persistence
